# OpenAI Codex Changelog

## April 23, 2026 — Codex CLI 0.123.0 (NEW)
- **Amazon Bedrock model provider support** with AWS profile configuration — Codex can now use AWS Bedrock-hosted models as an inference backend
- Enhanced MCP diagnostics via `/mcp verbose` command — richer telemetry on MCP server calls
- Improved realtime handoffs allowing background agents to receive transcript deltas

## April 20, 2026 — Codex CLI 0.122.0
- Standalone installs now work correctly on Windows and Intel Macs with improved "codex app" integration
- TUI supports "/side" conversations and queued slash commands while work runs
- Plan Mode can start fresh implementation with context usage visibility
- Plugin workflows include tabbed browsing, inline toggles, and multi-source marketplace support
- Filesystem permissions now support deny-read glob policies
- Isolated sandbox enforcement added
- Tool discovery and image generation enabled by default

## April 18, 2026 — Codex Apps SDK Submission Flow
- Official roundup of enhancements to the ChatGPT Apps SDK submission process

## April 16, 2026 — Codex Major Update (beyond coding)
"Codex is getting a major update. Already used by millions of developers, it is now expanding beyond coding to support a broader range of work."
- In-app browser for local/public page previews (early-stage)
- Computer use for macOS app operation (seeing, clicking, typing) for native app testing and GUI-only bug handling
- Chats without project folders (projectless threads for research, writing, planning, analysis)
- Thread automations — scheduled wake-ups preserving conversation context for monitoring and automated follow-up loops
- Pull request workflow integration — inspect GitHub PRs, review diffs, inspect changed files, streamlined feedback
- Task sidebar — dedicated sidebar tracking plans, sources, generated artifacts, and summaries
- Artifact viewer — preview generated files (PDFs, spreadsheets, documents, presentations) in sidebar before commit

## April 15, 2026 — CLI 0.121.0
- Marketplace installation from GitHub/git URLs
- TUI history with Ctrl+R reverse search
- Memory mode controls
- MCP Apps tool calls
- Parallel-call opt-in
- Realtime/app-server APIs for output modality and transcript events
- Secure devcontainer profile with bubblewrap

## Version 0.120.0 (April 11, 2026)
- Realtime V2 background agent progress streaming with queued follow-up responses
- Enhanced hook activity display in TUI
- Custom TUI status lines supporting renamed thread titles
- Code-mode tool declarations include MCP outputSchema details
- SessionStart hooks distinguish sessions created by /clear from fresh startup

## Version 0.119.0 (April 10, 2026)
- Realtime voice sessions default to v2 WebRTC with configurable transport and voice selection
- MCP Apps support: resource reads, tool-call metadata, custom-server tool search
- Remote/app-server workflows with egress websocket transport
- TUI copy latest agent response with Ctrl+O
- /resume command jumps directly to sessions by ID or name
- Configurable TUI notifications with Warp OSC 9 support
- codex exec-server experimental subcommand

## Last Fetched
2026-04-23 — NEW: CLI 0.123.0 with Amazon Bedrock model provider support, /mcp verbose diagnostics, realtime transcript handoffs.
